recipe_types.name: scene_analysis
recipe_types.primary_use: Map a long video into timestamped scenes before editing.

recipe_types.name: narrative_extraction
recipe_types.primary_use: Identify story beats for recap, trailer, or drama compression workflows.

recipe_types.name: highlight_mining
recipe_types.primary_use: Find short-form clip candidates from sports, gaming, podcasts, or live streams.

recipe_types.name: repurposing_brief
recipe_types.primary_use: Convert video understanding into a multi-platform content plan.
